hypothesis: If a two-stage transfer learning pipeline in which EfficientNet-B0 is pretrained on additive-free SEM images of NCM cathodes and then fine-tuned on additive-induced samples is used, then the model will achieve higher class-wise accuracy and F1 scores across the nine NCM composition–aging classes than models trained without pretraining or with only a single stage, and the weighted cross-entropy loss will outperform targeted oversampling during fine-tuning.
